     7вҶ’## 1. Entity м„Өкі„ мғҒм„ё
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’### ID м „лһө
    10вҶ’```kotlin

    23вҶ’### кҙҖкі„ л§Өн•‘

    25вҶ’// ManyToOne (к°ҖмһҘ нқ”н•Ё)

    40вҶ’### Enum л§Өн•‘

    47вҶ’enum class UserStatus(val value: Int) {

    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’## 2. Repository мғҒм„ё
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’### QueryDSL
    61вҶ’```kotlin
    62вҶ’interface CustomRepository {
    63вҶ’    fun findByComplexCondition(userId: String, status: Int): List<Entity>
    64вҶ’}
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’class CustomRepositoryImpl(
    67вҶ’    private val queryFactory: JPAQueryFactory,
    68вҶ’) : CustomRepository {
    69вҶ’    override fun findByComplexCondition(userId: String, status: Int): List<Entity> {
    70вҶ’        val entity = QEntity.entity
    71вҶ’        return queryFactory
    72вҶ’            .selectFrom(entity)
    73вҶ’            .where(
    74вҶ’                entity.userId.eq(userId),
    75вҶ’                entity.status.eq(status),
    76вҶ’                entity.deletedAt.isNull,
    77вҶ’            )
    78вҶ’            .orderBy(entity.createdAt.desc())
    79вҶ’            .fetch()
    80вҶ’    }
    81вҶ’}
    82вҶ’```
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’### Native Query

    86вҶ’@Query("""

    93вҶ’```

    95вҶ’## 3. gRPC м—җлҹ¬ мІҳлҰ¬ мғҒм„ё
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’### м„ңлІ„ мёЎ (л§ҲмқҙнҒ¬лЎңм„ңл№„мҠӨ)
    98вҶ’```kotlin
    99вҶ’override fun getFeature(
   100вҶ’    request: GetFeatureRequest,
   101вҶ’    responseObserver: StreamObserver<GetFeatureResponse>,
   102вҶ’) {
   103вҶ’    try {
   104вҶ’        val result = service.getFeature(request.id)
